title: The Escape Narrows Around the Sunny
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Chiffon, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16, Nami as The escape from Totto Land tightens while Luffy’s duel with Katakuri becomes a test of endurance and will.
scene: The Sunny escape, Sanji’s cake plan, and Luffy’s mirror-world duel all converge under Big Mom’s pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: bege's ship is coming this way! All soldiers, full alert!

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: bege's ship is coming this way!

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: Hahaha! I can see Bege's ship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Lord Oven's carriage is approaching the Harbor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: That's the way your daddy lives!

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: What next? I'm right behind you, Bege!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: OH NO... WE'VE MADE BROTHER OVEN MAD...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can see the shadows of several ships out there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Prepare for incoming fire! We've just escaped!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Eye- Witness reports of straw hat Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Straw hat appears through be running wild through mirror world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Did sister Brucee get captured again?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Some residents reported seeing a strange-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: What are you even trying to do?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you really want to run, then just head straight for cacao Island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I over- heard you! HAA... HAA...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If this fight drags on long enough, his observation Haki will definitely start to get weaker!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wiwi! I guess you're not as stupid as you look when it comes to fighting.

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 46 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s pursuit, the cake delivery, and Luffy’s duel place every escape route under pressure.
